name: Wendell Holland
signature_move: In the first-ever tied Final Tribal Council vote (5-5 between Wendell and Domenick), Laurel served as the tiebreaker and chose Wendell — a testament to the personal bonds he built throughout the game.
strategy_summary: Wendell played a balanced, well-rounded game alongside his Day 1 ally Domenick Abbate. While Domenick was the more visible strategist, Wendell's warmth, social connections, and challenge prowess gave him just enough edge to win the closest jury vote in Survivor history. He found and successfully played a hidden immunity idol and won 4 individual immunities.
fun_fact: Wendell is a furniture designer who built a shelter so impressive that his tribemates commented on it throughout the season — his craftsmanship extended to building social relationships as carefully as he built furniture.
